chosen_canonical_deploy_target.hard_reason: local k3d is the only reachable cluster context from this workspace; cloud-dev kubeconfig previously exposed no usable contexts. The first golden proof needs an executable substrate, not a simultaneous local/cloud choice.

blocker_classification.cause: the original ApplicationSet generated dev, test, and prod Applications on one local k3d node
blocker_classification.action: removed from local ApplicationSet generator and deleted local gmd-prod Application/namespace

blocker_classification.cause: test added the same local substrate pressure and an additional frontend LoadBalancer
blocker_classification.action: removed from local ApplicationSet generator and deleted local gmd-test Application/namespace

blocker_classification.blocker: 0/1 nodes are available: free ports unavailable
blocker_classification.cause: each gmd environment created a frontend-external LoadBalancer service; k3s service-lb tried to claim the same host port on the single local node
blocker_classification.action: patched the local ApplicationSet template with helm parameter frontend.externalService=false; dev readback uses ClusterIP plus port-forward

blocker_classification.cause: transient partial Argo CD bootstrap ordering during install before the redis secret/pod settled
blocker_classification.action: verified all Argo CD pods are now Running, including argocd-redis

blocker_classification.cause: local k3d proof has no public hostname contract
blocker_classification.action: used truthful local live readback via port-forward; public DNS remains for the cloud-dev proof

runtime_changes: Installed Argo CD into local k3d with server-side apply after client-side CRD annotation limit blocked ApplicationSet CRD creation.
Created local argocd repo secret for https://github.com/marekhotshot/amof.git from available Git token.
Patched local ApplicationSet to generate only dev.
Patched local ApplicationSet Helm parameters to set frontend.externalService=false.
Deleted local gmd-test and gmd-prod Applications and namespaces.

golden_flow_result.release_promote_reason: release/promote are gated until deploy and live readback pass; this slice stops at local deploy/readback by request

next_slice.goal: Route the proven local gmd-dev deploy/readback path through the Director delivery contract instead of manual kubectl steps, preserving the same dev-only scope.
